esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-prometheusreceiver.otel-*
// clock_offset_meannanos: default max 500ms; alert when > 400ms (80% of max)
// Adjust threshold (400000000 = 400ms in nanos) if max_clock_offset differs
| WHERE metrics.clock_offset_meannanos IS NOT NULL
  AND metrics.clock_offset_meannanos > 400000000
| STATS offset_nanos = MAX(metrics.clock_offset_meannanos)
  BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id, attributes.node_id
| SORT offset_nanos DESC
